tagline: Proudly protecting our communities from the elements — including time.
seoDescription: Crandall Roofing, Inc. is a Diamond Certified, GAF Master Elite roofing contractor serving Santa Rosa and the North Bay since 1995. Re-roofs, repairs, sheet metal, gutters, and commercial roofing. CSLB Lic. #452195.
heroHeading: North Bay roofing done right since 1995
heroSubheading: Diamond Certified, GAF Master Elite roofing for Santa Rosa, Sonoma, Marin, and Napa — from full re-roofs to repairs, sheet metal, and commercial work.
highlights: Serving the North Bay since 1995 — 30 years in business
Diamond Certified and GAF Master Elite contractor
CSLB Licensed #452195 (C-39 Roofing) · BBB A+ Accredited
Composition, tile, flat/low-slope, metal, sheet metal & gutters
Sonoma, Marin & Napa Counties — Santa Rosa, Windsor, Healdsburg, Petaluma & beyond
aboutHeading: Three decades of North Bay roofs
aboutBody: Crandall Roofing, Inc. has been protecting homes and businesses across the North Bay since 1995. Based at 183 Oceanic Way in Santa Rosa and led by Thomas Carrell, the company has completed thousands of residential and commercial roofing projects throughout Sonoma, Marin, and Napa Counties.

That track record has earned the credentials that matter: Diamond Certified — awarded to fewer than 5% of California contractors after independent customer surveys — along with GAF Master Elite and ShingleMaster status, Malarkey certification, an A+ BBB accreditation, and CSLB License #452195. From composition shingle to tile, flat, and metal roofs, Crandall builds with Class A fire-rated materials and backs the work with factory-certified extended warranties. The team serves both English- and Spanish-speaking customers.
servicesHeading: Roofing services for every home and building

services.title: Roof Replacement & Re-Roofing
services.description: Complete tear-off and replacement in composition shingle, tile, flat/low-slope, and metal — installed with Class A fire-rated materials and factory-certified extended warranties.

services.title: New Roof Construction
services.description: Roofing for new builds and additions, engineered and installed to North Bay code and the demands of local weather.

services.title: Roof Repair
services.description: Fast, clean fixes for leaks, storm and wind damage, and aging roofs — with crews that answer the call and get someone out promptly.

services.title: Roof Maintenance & Restoration
services.description: Inspections and upkeep that extend the life of your existing roof and head off costly water damage before it starts.

services.title: Sheet Metal Fabrication & Gutters
services.description: Custom sheet metal work, flashing, and seamless gutter systems that move water away from your home for good.

services.title: Commercial Roofing
services.description: Low-slope and flat-roof systems for commercial and multi-family properties, completed with minimal disruption to tenants and operations.

testimonials.quote: The quality of their work is really high. They were professional, they gave us updates throughout the job and they made sure our area was left cleaner than when they arrived.
testimonials.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

testimonials.quote: I was just impressed with how quick and how tidy they were. There was never a mess. They had someone cleaning up all the time. They were good about answering my calls and sending someone out immediately when I had a leak.
testimonials.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

testimonials.quote: The crew on the site was superb. They were respectful of our needs, and they cleaned up daily.
testimonials.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

testimonials.quote: It has truly been refreshing to deal with someone who follows through on their promises and does the work at a fair price.
testimonials.author: Verified review · Santa Rosa

notes: VERIFIED 2026-06-23 from crandallroofing.com (home, about, reviews pages), BBB, Yelp, Diamond Certified, and CSLB. Founded 1995 (company brands '30 years' / 'since 1995'; BBB lists started 1984 / incorporated 2008 — used the company's own 1995 founding claim). Owner/principal: Thomas Carrell (per BBB). CSLB License #452195 (C-39 Roofing), exp. 11/30/2026, A+ BBB Accredited since 2002. Diamond Certified, GAF Master Elite, ShingleMaster, Malarkey certified. Services serve Sonoma/Marin/Napa. Testimonials are real verified customer quotes from Diamond Certified surveys + the company's own reviews page. Hours not published online (left []). Sources: crandallroofing.com, bbb.org, yelp.com/biz/crandall-roofing-santa-rosa-5, diamondcertified.org.
